gateway.description: Initialize Express web server with basic health-check endpoint
Set up the in-memory Event Emitter (EventEmitter2 or native)
gateway.requirement: implement event bus for internal messaging

gateway.description: Create a GatewayRouter class that listens to HTTP POST requests and emits standardized internal events (e.g., MessageReceived)
gateway.requirement: implement route handlers and map them to event emissions

gateway.description: Deliverable: A running Express server that successfully logs incoming webhook payloads and emits them internally

channels.description: Install and configure the grammY library
channels.requirement: add grammY dependency and initialize bot

channels.description: Create a TelegramChannel class responsible for registering webhooks with the telegram API
channels.requirement: implement telegram webhook integration in src/channels/

channels.description: Map Telegram specific structures to the internal MessageReceived event
channels.requirement: normalize telegram updates to internal schema

channels.description: Deliverable: The Gateway can successfully receive a message sent from a real Telegram client

storage.description: Create a SessionStore interface and a JsonSessionStore implementation
storage.requirement: implement json file storage adapter in src/storage/

storage.description: Implement getChatHistory(userId) and appendMessage(userId, message) methods
storage.requirement: implement read/write logic for session history

storage.description: Ensure proper-lockfile (or similar) is used to prevent concurrent write corruption
Deliverable: Messages sent via Telegram are successfully saved and appended to a sessions/<user_id>.json file on disk

engine.description: Create a GeminiAgentWorker class that subscribes to the MessageReceived event on the Event Bus
engine.requirement: implement worker listening to internal bus in src/engine/

engine.description: Implement initialization logic to boot up the @google/gemini-cli-sdk
Pass the retrieved chat history (from SessionStore) into the Gemini context
Process the LLM generation using the Gemini 2.5 Flash model
Deliverable: The agent successfully generates a response based on the prompt + JSON history
engine.requirement: verify llm output is generated from input

reverse_routing.description: The GeminiAgentWorker emits an AgentResponse event back to the Event Bus
reverse_routing.requirement: emit response event out of the engine

reverse_routing.description: The TelegramChannel listens for AgentResponse and dispatches the text back to the Telegram API
reverse_routing.requirement: send response payload back to telegram via grammY

reverse_routing.description: Deliverable (E2E): A user sends a message on Telegram, the system routes it, persists it, processes it via Gemini, and replies back on Telegram with conversational awareness
